Tests the behavior of the Math.tan function with negative zero input.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests the behavior of the `Math.tan` function in JavaScript. It checks if the result of `1/Math.tan(-0)` is equal to `-Infinity`. This test is likely used to verify the correct handling of edge cases involving negative zero in trigonometric calculations. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on this mathematical operation and its expected result.
